description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a rounded, streamlined fuselage painted in a bright orange-red color. It features a single, bubble-like cockpit canopy with a clear windshield and visible interior controls, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The airplane is equipped with three large, straight propeller blades mounted at the nose, giving it a distinctive tri-blade appearance. The wings are short, stubby, and mounted low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angle. The tail section is minimalistic, with a small vertical stabilizer and no prominent horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear consists of two small, fixed wheels under the fuselage and a rear skid, indicating a simple, lightweight design suitable for short takeoffs and landings.
description: A compact, orange-red airplane with a bubble cockpit, tri-blade nose propeller, short low-mounted wings, and minimal tail and landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tri-blade propeller, rounded nose, and clear cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bubble cockpit, short low-mounted wing, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view displaying the minimal tail, rear skid, and propeller blades from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the cockpit profile, wing, and rear fuselage details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with short, straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with tri-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single small vertical stabilizer and minimal horizontal stabilizer surfaces.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed landing gear with two main wheels and a rear skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed bubble cockpit with a clear canopy.
